title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Mahindra - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Mahindra - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
